mapping.description:
Parses the browsing hisory database of a Chrome profile (typically `*/Default/History`). It extracts each recorded URL, its page title, visit timestamps, the number of times the URL was visited, and the referer URL if available.
- Shows which web resources a user accessed. - Provides visit frequency, helping gauge the relevance of each site. - Captures the referer, offering context about navigation paths.
mapping.query: SELECT urls.url, urls.title, visits.visit_time/1000 - 11644473600000 AS visit_date_ms, urls.visit_count, referer.url AS referer, urls.hidden FROM urls LEFT JOIN visits on urls.id = visits.url LEFT JOIN urls as referer on visits.from_visit = referer.id ORDER BY urls.url, visits.visit_time

field.description: total number of times the URL was visited
URL of the page that referred to this visit, if available
flag indicating whether the entry is hidden (1) or not (0)
